vulnerabilities.title: @siteboon/claude-code-ui Vulnerable to Unauthenticated RCE via WebSocket Shell Injection
vulnerabilities.description:
# Security Advisory: Insecure Default JWT Secret + WebSocket Auth Bypass Enables Unauthenticated RCE via Shell Injection
Download: [cve_claudecodeui_submission_v2.zip](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/25686652/cve_claudecodeui_submission_v2.zip)

| **Affected versions** | `<= 1.24.0` (latest) |
| **Severity** | Critical |
| **CVSS Score** | 9.8 |

vulnerabilities.title: @siteboon/claude-code-ui is Vulnerable to Shell Command Injection in Git Routes
vulnerabilities.description:
# Shell Command Injection in User Git Config Endpoint

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Severity** | High |
| **CVSS 3.1** | 8.8 (High) — when chained with VULN-01 |
| **CWE** | CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection') |
| **Attack Vector** | Network |
| **Authentication** | JWT required (bypassable via VULN-01) |
| **Affected Files** | `server/routes/user.js` (lines 58-59) |
